docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $486.56 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT MARIO MOGANNAM IND/DBA 1103 PAGE ST. APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MARIO MOGANNAM IND/DBA 1103 PAGE ST. APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIO MOGANNAM IND/DBA 1103 PAGE ST. APTS. $486.56 PRINCIPAL, $20.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $507.35 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
